commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Maintainer review is required because the PR has a protected maintainer label, is dirty/unmergeable, changes fail-closed install policy, and has one scoped review finding that needs author or maintainer action.; Needs attention: The hardening direction is security-positive, but this PR makes ClawHub trust endpoint data an install-time security boundary and needs explicit maintainer acceptance.; Review finding... (sha=b08ced424daa970c466e2fd80aca944ba5f4ac54)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds ClawHub exact-release trust checks and acknowledgement handling across plugin and skill install/update paths, Gateway/UI error details, persisted install metadata, docs, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +2530, Tests +4336, Docs +38, Other +21. Total +6925 across 70 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection of PR head shows every non-ClawHub plugin install logs the new future-blocking warning. For the central hardening request, this is not a current-main bug repro; current-main source only shows the missing pre-download trust gate.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainer review is required because the PR has a protected maintainer label, is dirty/unmergeable, changes fail-closed install policy, and has one scoped review finding that needs author or maintainer action.

target.title: Check ClawHub trust before plugin and skill installs
target.body:
## Summary OpenClaw now checks ClawHub exact-release trust before downloading ClawHub plugin releases and archive-backed ClawHub skill releases. Malicious or ClawHub-blocked releases fail closed before download, suspicious/review-required releases require acknowledgement, and pending or stale non-risk trust states warn without blocking. > [!IMPORTANT] > Official/source-linked ClawHub metadata is a trust signal, not a security bypass. `@openclaw/kitchen-sink` can be official/source-linked and still follows the exact release trust verdict before install or update proceeds. ## What Changed | Surface | New behavior | | --- | --- | | Plugin installs | Check ClawHub release trust before archive download; blocked/malicious releases do not download. | | Skill installs | Apply the same release trust gate to archive-backed ClawHub skills, including owner-qualified `@owner/slug` refs. | | Plugin and skill updates | Leave the installed item unchanged when the latest release is malicious, blocked, risky without acknowledgement, or security-unavailable. | | Acknowledgement UX | Suspicious/review-required releases require either an interactive acknowledgement or `--acknowledge-clawhub-risk`. | | Official metadata | Persist and display source-linked/official metadata, but do not let it bypass release security. | | Fallbacks | Preserve availability-only artifact fallback, but do not fall back for trust, integrity, malicious, or blocked failures. | | Docs | Update ClawHub, plugin, skill, and update CLI docs for the new trust gate and acknowledgement flag. | ## Proof Behavioral proof is tied to PR head `b08ced424daa970c466e2fd80aca944ba5f4ac54`. | Behavior | Reviewer-checkable proof | | --- | --- | | Malicious or blocked plugin release | `openclaw plugins install clawhub:` exits `1`, prints `BLOCKED`, and does not install. | | Suspicious plugin release | Without acknowledgement exits `1`; with `--acknowledge-clawhub-risk` exits `0` and keeps the warning visible. | | Clean plugin release | Community and official/source-linked plugin releases install successfully. | | Malicious or blocked skill release | `openclaw skills install @owner/ --global` exits `1`, prints `BLOCKED`, and does not install. | | Suspicious skill release | Without acknowledgement exits `1`; with `--acknowledge-clawhub-risk` exits `0` and keeps the warning visible. | | Clean skill release | Community and official/source-linked skill releases install successfully. | | Malicious latest update | The update does not download the latest release and tells the user to uninstall the installed item unless independently reviewed. | | Chat / Control UI | Chat cannot acknowledge risky plugin installs; Control UI skill installs receive structured trust errors and can retry with acknowledgement. |
End-to-end install transcript matrix | Scenario | Command surface | Result | | --- | --- | --- | | malicious / blocked plugin release | `openclaw plugins install clawhub:` | exits `1`, prints `BLOCKED`, does not install | | suspicious plugin release without acknowledgement | `openclaw plugins install clawhub:` | exits `1`, prints `WARNING`, does not install | | suspicious plugin release with acknowledgement | `openclaw plugins install clawhub: --acknowledge-clawhub-risk` | exits `0`, warning remains visible | | clean community plugin release | `openclaw plugins install clawhub:` | exits `0` | | clean official/source-linked plugin release | `openclaw plugins install clawhub:` | exits `0`; official metadata does not bypass release trust | | malicious / blocked skill release | `openclaw skills install @owner/ --global` | exits `1`, prints `BLOCKED`, does not install | | suspicious skill release without acknowledgement | `openclaw skills install @owner/ --global` | exits `1`, prints `WARNING`, does not install | | suspicious skill release with acknowledgement | `openclaw skills install @owner/ --global --acknowledge-clawhub-risk` | exits `0`, warning remains visible | | clean community skill release | `openclaw skills install @owner/ --global` | exits `0` | | clean official/source-linked skill release | `openclaw skills install @owner/ --global` | exits `0`; official metadata does not bypass release trust |
Warning examples Suspicious plugin warning: ```text WARNING - ClawHub found security risks in this release - Security scan: suspicious - Finding: suspicious payload strings This plugin is not marked malicious, but ClawHub found security findings or a large local system blast radius. Review the ClawHub security details before installing. ``` Suspicious skill warning: ```text WARNING - ClawHub found security risks in this release - Security scan: suspicious - Finding: security status is not clean This skill is not marked malicious, but ClawHub found security findings or a large instruction/tool-use blast radius. Review the ClawHub security details before installing. ``` Blocked release warning: ```text BLOCKED - ClawHub flagged this release as malicious - Security scan: malicious - Moderation: quarantined - Finding: manual_moderation - Scanner: malicious behavior detected - Finding: Download disabled by ClawHub for this release ``` Malicious latest update warning: ```text Latest plugin version is marked malicious; OpenClaw will not download it. Uninstall the installed plugin unless you have independently reviewed it. Latest skill version is marked malicious; OpenClaw will not download it. Uninstall the installed skill unless you have independently reviewed it. ``` Raw static-analysis and VirusTotal links are intentionally not printed.
Additional covered edge cases | Case | Covered surface | Expected behavior | | --- | --- | --- | | review-required or failed verdict | CLI acknowledgement helper, plugin install/update, skill install/update | requires typing the target package/skill label before continuing | | review-recommended release | CLI acknowledgement helper, plugin install/update, skill install/update | uses a yes/no confirmation before continuing | | pending or stale non-risk trust | plugin install/update warning output and JSON update output | warns that the scan is pending or stale without requiring acknowledgement | | ClawHub security unavailable | plugin install, skill install, plugin update, skill update, doctor/update repair | fails closed for installs; for updates/repair, leaves the installed item unchanged and reports the security-data failure | | owner-qualified skills | skill install/update, warnings, retry payloads, links | validates publisher identity and uses `@owner/slug`, not a bare slug, in warnings and acknowledgements | | trust failure fallback | plugin install/update and doctor repair fallback paths | does not fall back to npm/default fallback for malicious, blocked, integrity, or trust failures | | availability fallback | official ClawHub artifact availability paths | keeps existing availability-only fallback semantics where ClawHub artifact misses can fall back to trusted npm packages | | dry-run updates | plugin update and `openclaw update` post-core work | does not create an interactive ClawHub risk prompt during dry-run work | | onboarding and doctor repair | onboarding plugin installs and missing configured plugin repair | forwards acknowledgement guidance and does not silently install risky ClawHub releases | | chat plugin install | `/plugins install ...` | risky ClawHub plugin installs cannot be acknowledged from chat and tell the user to use a trusted local shell command | | chat skill install | chat command routing | there is no `/skills install` chat command path in this PR; chat `/skill [input]` only invokes existing skills | | Control UI skill install | Gateway `skills.install`, Skills panel controller/view | malicious/suspicious skill releases fail before download; suspicious releases surface as structured errors with acknowledgement retry |
## Screenshots > [!NOTE] > Terminal screenshots are not embedded because no PR-visible screenshot upload was completed from this environment. The reviewer-visible proof is the refreshed command transcript excerpts above plus focused tests for non-terminal update, repair, chat, Gateway, and Control UI paths. A screenshot can still be added later through GitHub's attachment UI if visual terminal proof is required before landing. ## Verification | Check | Result | | --- | --- | | Proof-pack net-diff pass against `origin/main` | passed | | `node .artifacts/clawhub-install-trust/run-proof.cjs` | passed; regenerated the 10-scenario plugin/skill trust command transcript | | `git diff --check 106961b51351e3f6cbb10839cb357b130e1a477b...HEAD` | passed | | `pnpm docs:list` | passed | | `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/clawhub.test.ts src/plugins/clawhub.test.ts src/plugins/update.test.ts src/skills/lifecycle/clawhub.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/skills.clawhub.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/skills.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/skills.test.ts` | passed: 360 tests | | `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/clawhub-risk-acknowledgement.test.ts src/cli/plugins-cli.install.test.ts src/cli/plugins-cli.update.test.ts src/cli/skills-cli.commands.test.ts src/cli/update-cli.test.ts src/cli/update-cli/post-core-plugin-convergence.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.test.ts src/commands/onboarding-plugin-install.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-plugins.install.test.ts` | passed: 546 tests | Not run locally: full `pnpm check`, full build, Crabbox/Testbox, live ClawHub install scenarios, or browser screenshot audit. CI should cover broader gates on the pushed PR head.
target.author: jesse-merhi
